title: Stack API Error
description: RFC 7807 problem details for non-2xx public stack REST API responses. Every problem carries a stable stack error code plus optional structured context.

ProblemTypeUri.description: Dereferenceable URI for the documented error type.

ErrorCode.description: Stable machine-readable stack error code. Prefixes are governed by ADR 0092a.

Problem.description: RFC 7807 problem details response with stack-generic machine code and optional context.

type.description: Dereferenceable URI for the documented error type.

title.description: Short human-readable summary of this problem type.

status.description: HTTP status code generated by the server for this problem.

detail.description: Human-readable detail specific to this occurrence.
examples: No workflow process exists for the requested identifier.

instance.description: URI reference for the affected resource when a single resource caused the problem.
